operational_knowledge_units.title: RobotDatabaseModel stores per-robot operational data
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The RobotDatabaseModel table contains data for every robot in the system, including robot state, tote name, assigned sorter side, current location ID, and destination location.
observed_evidence: Visible text: "The RobotDatabaseModel table contains the data for every robot in the system including its state, tote name, assigned sorterside, currentlocationid, destination location, and state."
Visual element indicates a database schema context.
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: RobotDatabaseModel table robotics database stores data for every robot in the system including robot state, tote name, assigned sorterside, currentlocationid, and destination location.
